div.h1: Direct I/O Alignment Requirements (Intel SDM Grade)
div.p: O_DIRECT enforces strict alignment for DMA transfers to bypass Kernel Page Cache.

Implementation Note: Use posix_memalign(&buf, sysconf(_SC_PAGESIZE), size) to ensure cross-platform compliance. Direct I/O bypasses the page cache, meaning the CPU cache and storage media are not kept coherent by the kernel.
